name: build-web-lab
description: Testing plugin for web UI planning, audits, and lightweight launch work.

interface.shortDescription: Prototype, review, and tighten small web app changes
interface.longDescription: Use Build Web Lab to audit frontend structure, shape small implementation plans, and prepare simple launch-ready follow-up tasks for test projects.
defaultPrompt: Audit this frontend and suggest the next three improvements.
Turn this product idea into a small web app plan.
Review this UI change before I ship it.
